Poker Hand #HD1111111111: Hold'em No Limit ($0.05/$0.10) - 2024/01/15 20:30:00
Table 'Rush&Cash1' 6-Max Seat #3 is the button
Seat 1: Hero ($10.50 in chips)
Seat 2: Villain1 ($8.20 in chips)
Seat 3: Villain2 ($12.00 in chips)
Seat 4: Villain3 ($9.75 in chips)
Seat 5: Villain4 ($11.30 in chips)
Seat 6: Villain5 ($10.00 in chips)
Villain3: posts small blind $0.05
Villain4: posts big blind $0.10
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to Hero [Ah Kd]
Villain5: folds [Fast Fold]
Hero: raises $0.20 to $0.30
Villain1: folds [Fast Fold]
Villain2: calls $0.30
Villain3: folds
Villain4: folds
*** FLOP *** [7h 8c As]
Hero: bets $0.45
Villain2: folds
Hero collected $0.75 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot $0.78 | Rake $0.03
Board [7h 8c As]
Seat 1: Hero (utg+1) collected ($0.75)
Seat 2: Villain1 folded before Flop (didn't bet)
Seat 3: Villain2 (button) folded on the Flop
Seat 4: Villain3 (small blind) folded before Flop
Seat 5: Villain4 (big blind) folded before Flop
Seat 6: Villain5 folded before Flop (didn't bet)
